PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLANO, LUIS RAMIREZ, RAMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKARIAN, ALAN PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC $3,213.33 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,213.33, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: DEFTS TO PAY AS FOLLOWS: TO PLTF SOLANO: $2213.33 [$1613.33 PROPERTY DAMAGE] TO PLTF RAMIREZ: $1000.00 AND STATUTORY COSTS TO BOTH PLAINTIFFS
